name: Nanjing Yunhai Special Metals Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Yunhai Special Metals Co., Ltd. engages in mining and non-ferrous metal smelting and processing in China and internationally. It offers magnesium, aluminum, strontium, and other raw materials that are used in transportation, 3C electronics, and aerospace industries. The company's products include magnesium grains and rods, magnesium alloy ingots and extrusion sheets, and aluminum alloy ingots and billets. It also provides strontium metal and master alloy products; and die casting and extrusion products, as well as micro channel flat tubes. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Nanjing, China.
